name: testDisplayCorrectColumnHeadersInAcquirersTable
description: Verify Acquirers table contains correct column headers
descriptionHtml: Verify Acquirers table contains correct column headers

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify Acquirers table contains correct column headers

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Verify: The Acquirer table contains correct column headers
